name: VISKAFORS Armchair
key_features: Deep seat perfect for curling up
user_friendly_description: Soft, embracing feel with pocket springs. Built to last with 30,000-cycle fabric testing.
reviews_summary: Users love for reading. Common mentions: 'super comfortable', 'great for curling up', 'sturdy quality'

name: STRANDMON Wing Chair
key_features: High back provides extra support for your neck
user_friendly_description: A timeless piece that offers great comfort and support. Perfect for a traditional reading corner.
reviews_summary: Excellent back support. Very stylish and sturdy.

name: LANDSKRONA Sofa
user_friendly_description: Combines comfort and design with a sleek, modern look. The tufted details add a touch of luxury.
reviews_summary: Very easy to assemble. Looks much more expensive than it is.

name: LACK Side Table
key_features: Matches other products in the LACK series
user_friendly_description: A simple, functional side table that fits anywhere. Lightweight and easy to move around.
reviews_summary: Great value for money. Perfect for small spaces.

name: HEMNES Coffee Table
key_features: Solid wood has a natural feel
user_friendly_description: A sturdy coffee table made of solid wood. The shelf underneath keeps your living room tidy.
reviews_summary: Beautiful wood finish. Very solid and well-made.

name: RANARP Floor Lamp
user_friendly_description: An industrial-style lamp that provides excellent directed light. Perfect for reading or working.
reviews_summary: Looks great in my home office. Very sturdy and adjustable.

name: NYMÖ Lamp Shade
key_features: Perforated shade creates decorative light patterns
Easy to attach to lamp base
user_friendly_description: Creates a cozy atmosphere with beautiful light patterns. The copper interior adds a warm glow.
reviews_summary: Absolutely beautiful. The light patterns it makes are stunning.

name: MALM Desk
key_features: Finished back; can be placed in the middle of a room
user_friendly_description: A sleek desk with a clean design. The cable shelf keeps wires out of sight but close at hand.
reviews_summary: Perfect for my home office. Very easy to keep organized.
